mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_record (user_id, item_id, quantity, status, requested_time, approved_time, returned_time, deposit_snapshot, condition_on_borrow, condition_on_return, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{requestedTime}, #{approvedTime}, #{returnedTime}, #{depositSnapshot}, #{conditionOnBorrow}, #{conditionOnReturn}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET user_id = #{userId}, item_id = #{itemId}, quantity = #{quantity}, status = #{status}, requested_time = #{requestedTime}, approved_time = #{approvedTime}, returned_time = #{returnedTime}, deposit_snapshot = #{depositSnapshot}, condition_on_borrow = #{conditionOnBorrow}, condition_on_return = #{conditionOnReturn}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, item_id, quantity, status, requested_time, approved_time, returned_time, deposit_snapshot, condition_on_borrow, condition_on_return, remark, create_time, update_time FROM borrow_record WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = br.user_id LEFT JOIN warehouse_item wi ON wi.id = br.item_id
